_notes: Starter build templates. Match is name-based (case-insensitive) against the user's decorated inventory. Each weapon slot lists options in priority order; the fitter takes the first one the user owns. Missing items show as 'NEED — drops from X' hints rather than blocking the rest of the build. Edit this file freely; the frontend hot-reloads on refresh.

builds.name: Well of Radiance — Solar Warlock support

exotic_armor.drops_from: Phoenix Protocol: Lost Sector exotic rotator (chest day). Sanguine Alchemy: Lost Sector rotator or Xur.

builds.playstyle: Plant Well of Radiance during DPS phases — your team stands in it for healing + Radiant. Phoenix Protocol kills inside Well refund Super energy. Heat Rises + Icarus Dash for air mobility on add-clear.

builds.name: Golden Gun — Celestial Nighthawk one-shot

exotic_armor.drops_from: Lost Sector exotic rotator (helmet day) or Xur.

builds.playstyle: Pop Golden Gun, line up a Celestial Nighthawk headshot for ~600k+ crit. Still Hunt synergizes — its Golden Gun rounds also benefit from Nighthawk. Save Super for damage phases, use grenades + Knock 'Em Down sustain in between.

builds.name: Loreley Healing Wall — Solar Titan survivability

exotic_armor.drops_from: Lost Sector exotic rotator (helmet day) or Xur.

builds.playstyle: Drop the Throwing Hammer for Sunspots and Roaring Flames stacks. Loreley triggers when low-HP — your barricade becomes a healing Sunspot. Stack Restoration via Ember of Empyrean to chain Sunspot kills indefinitely.

builds.name: Osmiomancy Tracking Grenades — Stasis Warlock control
builds.playstyle: Bleak Watcher Turret + Coldsnap Grenade with Osmiomancy = two tracking freezes per cooldown. Iceflare Bolts on frozen target spawns more Coldsnaps. Self-sustaining freeze loop on any Champion + add wave.

builds.name: Liar's Handshake — Arc Hunter Brawler
builds.playstyle: Tap-melee to bait an enemy's melee, then Liar's Handshake counter-punch hits for massive damage + heals you. Flow State on melee final blow grants Amplified for chained dodging. Best on melee-heavy maps; less effective against ranged-only encounters.
builds.source: Arc 3.0 — Brawler archetype (melee primary + health secondary).

builds.name: Banner of War — Strand Titan sustain

exotic_armor.drops_from: Lost Sector exotic rotator (gauntlets day) or Xur.

builds.playstyle: Frenzied Blade → Banner of War active → melee + sword kills extend the Banner timer and pulse-heal nearby teammates. Synthoceps multiplies melee damage when surrounded. Lament is the cleanest sword for Banner refresh under boss damage phases.
builds.source: Banner of War PvE archetype, post-Lightfall meta.
